function.message: Before we talk product, tell me whether you actually slept and went outside.
function.rulebook_notes: Resolved identity from canonical cast record, then exhaustively checked all channel logs as instructed by task-local hint.
function.outcome_justification: 10_entities/cast/sara.md identifies the entity as Sara Demir (alias sara). Across all transcripts in 60_outbox/channels/*.md, only health_signal.md contains a Sara Demir-authored entry, dated 2026-04-30, which is therefore the last recorded message from this entity.
